𝗘𝗣𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗠𝗘 | A versatile, privacy-conscious offline document and e-book reader for Android devices.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A versatile, privacy-conscious offline document and e-book reader for Android devices.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Supports PDF, EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, Markdown, HTML, and plain text.
✅ Ink and text annotations for PDFs.
✅ Native parsing for MOBI/AZW3 and EPUB.
✅ Customizable e-book reading (font size, line spacing, margins, custom fonts).
✅ Text-to-Speech (TTS) functionality.
✅ Built-in library organization.
✅ Offline-first and privacy-focused.


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 301 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 10 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 24 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Episteme Reader is a native Android application for reading various document and e-book formats offline. It focuses on privacy and offers features like annotations, text-to-speech, and customizable reading experiences.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗦𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗠 | Orchestrating and managing parallel, long-running autonomous coding sessions using Claude Code workers, with robust state persistence, behavioral governance, and real-time monitoring.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Orchestrating and managing parallel, long-running autonomous coding sessions using Claude Code workers, with robust state persistence, behavioral governance, and real-time monitoring.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Persistent State Management
✅ Parallel Claude Code Workers (tmux)
✅ Isolated Git Worktree Execution
✅ Protocol-Based Behavioral Governance
✅ Real-time Web Dashboard
✅ Long-Running Autonomy (Days-Long Sessions)
✅ Crash Recovery and Checkpointing
✅ Competitive Planning & Enforced Verification
✅ Automated Code & Architecture Reviews
✅ Platform Agnostic Setup (CI/CD, Docs)


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 104 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 8 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Claude Swarm is a TypeScript-based MCP server designed to orchestrate parallel Claude Code worker swarms for long-running autonomous coding sessions. It features persistent state management, parallel worker execution using tmux and isolated git worktrees, and protocol-based behavioral governance to enforce constraints during runtime.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ScanTailor Advanced is an interactive post-processing tool for scanned pages, merging and enhancing features from previous versions. It automates tasks like page splitting, deskewing, border adjustment, and content selection, preparing raw scans for digital assembly into formats like PDF or DjVu.

Open Library is an open-source project aiming to create a web page for every book ever published. It functions as an editable library catalog, allowing for community contributions to build a comprehensive database of literary works.

𝗣𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗪𝗔𝗬 | Building and deploying real-time data processing pipelines, analytics, and LLM applications using a unified Python API.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Building and deploying real-time data processing pipelines, analytics, and LLM applications using a unified Python API.
📅 Created: Nov 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Python ETL framework
✅ Stream processing
✅ Real-time analytics
✅ LLM pipelines and RAG
✅ Easy-to-use Python API
✅ Supports popular Python ML libraries
✅ Handles both batch and streaming data
✅ Versatile for development and production
✅ Scalable Rust engine
✅ Incremental computation
✅ Multithreading, multiprocessing, and distributed computations
✅ In-memory pipeline
✅ Docker and Kubernetes deployment


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

🍴 1.6K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pathway is a Python ETL framework designed for efficient stream processing, real-time analytics, and building LLM pipelines, including RAG. It offers a flexible Python API that works seamlessly with ML libraries, supporting both batch and streaming data for development and production. Its core is a scalable Rust engine that enables incremental computation, multithreading, multiprocessing, and distributed processing, with easy deployment options via Docker and Kubernetes.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅
